name: John's Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Green onion stems, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes until tender.
2. Let them cool slightly and then cut into small pieces, leaving skins on.
3. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
4. Chill before serving.
Made by John Harned, Summer 1992. Posted by Cathy Harned.
